title: Dr. Morelle: The Case of the Missing Heiress
writer: Roy Plomley, Ambrose Grayson, Wilfred Burr
actors: Valentine Dyall, Julia Lang, Hugh Griffith
plot: A young woman goes missing under strange circumstances. A friend of hers tries to find out what happened and it almost leads to another case of a missing young woman. Dr. Morrell has his hands full trying to solve this case.
